name: Herb & Apple-Filled Chicken Breast Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 Skinless Boneless Chicken Breast Halves (about 1 lb)
1/2 Cup Pippin or Rome Apple, peeled and finely chopped
1/4 Cup Minced Parsley (or any combination of basil, thyme, oregano)
1 Tablespoon Lowfat Sour Cream (or nonfat or regular)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken between plastic wrap until it is 1/4-inch thick.
2. In a bowl, combine apple, bread crumbs, herbs, green onion, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Stir in the sour cream.
4. Place chicken breasts on a flat surface and divide the herb mixture evenly over each breast.
5. Roll up the chicken starting at a narrow end; place seam side down in a greased baking dish. The rolls can be wrapped and frozen at this point. Thaw in the refrigerator before cooking.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Brush rolls with oil and bake for about 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. Using a serrated knife, cut into 1/3-inch slices. Serve warm with any drippings spooned over the top, or chill and slice just before serving. Garnish with apple slices and herb sprigs.
9. Serves 4.
